rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Certreq Downloading Malicious Binaries

rules.rule_text:
title: Certreq Downloading Malicious Binaries
id: da4eca65-03c5-497a-a8f0-d4b0534a5c53
status: experimental
description: "Just like certutil, certreq can also be abused by adversaries to download\
  \ and \nupload data. The following analytic will look for the execution of certreq.exe\
  \ \nwith command options that suggest a file is being downloaded. Part of the \n\
  RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/ingress-tool-transfer/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
- attack.t1105
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \certreq.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - -post
    - -config
    - http
    - get
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
